area: Parallel captain runner sync wipes foreign uncommitted source
finding: Another captain's `build(release): sync ... runner artifacts` (`3cd236598`) coincided with disappearance of uncommitted bug-fix WIP (team plan read-only, provider metadata, import/lock/incident edits).
expectedBehavior: Runner sync must refuse or snapshot-protect foreign dirty non-release paths before mutating the tree.
evidenceOrRepro: 2026-07-14 cursor-grok-4.5 lost 0195/099/159/097/102 WIP and had to re-implement after RFT-0020 sync.
followUp: Closed by ATM-GOV-0230 source/frozen disposition: runner-sync admission refuses landed foreign build-input claims before release publication, `runner-sync-build-source-preservation.test.ts` proves foreign non-release WIP remains byte-for-byte unchanged, and existing `runner-sync-foreign-dirty-owner.test.ts` keeps release-only writes admissible while build-input conflicts block.
